nodes.speaker: elder_rowan
nodes.text: Ah, a new soul drawn to Verdance. The Sap flows strong in you, I can feel it. Tell me... do you sense it? The rhythm beneath the earth?

choices.text: I feel something strange, yes. What is this place?
The ground seems to... pulse. Like a heartbeat.
I don't know what you're talking about, old man.

nodes.speaker: elder_rowan
nodes.text: This is Verdance, the heart of the Nexus. Here, the Sap Cycle governs all life. Three phases - Blue, Crimson, and Silver - each brings different power to those who can harness it.

nodes.speaker: elder_rowan
nodes.text: Ha! You have the Gift of Perception. Few newcomers feel the Sap Cycle so readily. The Nexus has chosen well in drawing you here.

nodes.speaker: elder_rowan
nodes.text: Patience, young one. Ignorance is no shame - but refusing to learn would be. The Sap Cycle cares not for your beliefs. It simply is.

nodes.speaker: elder_rowan
nodes.text: The Sap Cycle has three phases. During the Blue Phase, temporal magic surges. The Crimson Phase amplifies fire and raw power. And the Silver Phase... it touches the mysterious, the arcane, the unknown.

nodes.speaker: elder_rowan
nodes.text: If you wish to survive in Verdance, you must learn to read the Sap and bend it to your will. Start by venturing into the grove. Defeat the wild Sap Wisps and collect their fragments. Bring them back to me, and I shall teach you your first spell.

choices.text: I'll do it. Where can I find these Sap Wisps?
Sounds dangerous. What's in it for me?

nodes.speaker: elder_rowan
nodes.text: Follow the path east through the grove. The Wisps gather near the old Sap wells where the energy pools. Be wary - they are small, but their temporal bolts can disorient you.

nodes.speaker: elder_rowan
nodes.text: Pragmatic, are we? Very well. Help me, and I'll teach you to channel the Sap Cycle's power directly. Knowledge is the greatest currency in the Nexus, young one.

nodes.speaker: elder_rowan
nodes.text: Go now, and may the Sap guide your path. Return when you've gathered what I need.

nodes.speaker: merchant_kael
nodes.text: Welcome, traveler! Kael's Emporium has everything you need. Potions, materials, trinkets - if the Nexus made it, I sell it!

nodes.speaker: merchant_kael
nodes.text: Word is the Thornbacks are getting more aggressive near the grove. And there are whispers of something darker in the Crimson Wastes... Void energy, they say. Bad for business, that.

nodes.speaker: merchant_kael
nodes.text: I don't know much, and frankly I don't want to. The Sap Keepers are troubled though. If you want answers, talk to Sage Lyris. She knows more about the old threats than anyone.

nodes.speaker: merchant_kael
nodes.text: Safe travels! Come back anytime - Kael's is always open!
